reason: This is a common Islamic prayer/supplication (dua) from the Quran that is widely used by mainstream Muslims. It contains no extremist content or ISIS-specific rhetoric.
taxonomy_labels: Religion and Spirituality -> Prayers and Supplications
original_post: رَبَّنَا آتِنَا فِي الدُّنْيَا حَسَنَةً وَفِي الآخِرَةِ حَسَنَةً وَقِنَا عَذَابَ النَّارِ . #دعاء .
